scripts.build:ts: bun run --filter './packages/core' build && bun run --filter './packages/theming' build && bun run --filter './packages/runtime' build && bun run --filter './packages/system' build && bun run --filter './packages/vite-plugin' build && bun run --filter './packages/ui' build
scripts.build:all: bun run build:extract && bun run build:ts
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean:full && bun run build:all
scripts.verify: bun run build:ts && bun test && bun run test:types && bun run check
scripts.verify:full: bun run build:all && bun test && bun run check && bun run test:showcase
scripts.verify:showcase: bun run build:all && bun run --filter './packages/showcase' build
